subcodes.first_line: God willing, may ye ever drink from the ocean of joy and soar in the atmosphere of gladness and delight, even as birds soaring in truth [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: انشاء الله لازال از بحر فرح بیاشامید و در هوآء بهجت و سرو طائر فی الحقیقه
subcodes.subjects: @consolation and comfort, @praise and encouragement, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
